programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Charles Bronson. A lone high-priced hit man gets even with an underworld boss to avenge a double cross. (1970)
Hammer horror starring Oscar winner Joan Fontaine. A school teacher returns from a run-in with a witch doctor in Africa to find the small English town she's in is home to a coven of witches. (1967)
London TV returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Alex and Trivette reminisce about Walker's past adventures... S6, Ep17
An ambitious detective tries to frame one of Hooker's friends in connection with a gang of jewel thieves. S2, Ep8
While investigating the black market in nuclear weapons, Steve tries to retrieve secret papers from a yacht - but finds himself in grave danger instead. S1, Ep3
Toothy thriller starring Dolph Lundgren. A lake town is plunged into blood-soaked chaos when man-eating sharks invade their waters. (2015)

Western starring Luke Perry. A sheriff stops at nothing to find the escaped criminal who murdered the sheriff's wife and son. (2008)

Western with Gary Cooper. An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands to rescue settlers who have been captured by a group of marauding Seminole rebels. (1951)
The Enterprise responds to a 200-year-old distress signal from a lost Earth. S1, Ep4/30
After narrowly escaping with his life, Steve must infiltrate a huge terrorist complex to search for the stolen missiles. S1, Ep4
A hearing-impaired 14-year-old gang member is conned into taking the rap for a murder committed by a big-time drug dealer. S2, Ep9
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. Trivette's brother Simon is arrested by the Rangers, and finds out Simon has been told to kill him. S6, Ep18
Thriller with Milla Jovovich. A US embassy official based in London goes on the run after being framed for a terrorist bombing, and discovers a plot to detonate another bomb in New York. (2015)
Action thriller starring Kevin Costner. A dying CIA agent takes on one last assignment while trying to rebuild his relationship with his estranged daughter. (2014)
Adventure with Jonathan Rhys Meyers. The tale of James Brooke, the Rajah of Sarawak, who inspired the Rudyard Kipling story The Man Who Would Be King and Joseph Conrad's novel Lord Jim. (2021)
Violent crime thriller with Nicolas Cage. When his brother falls foul of a ruthless mobster, a straight-laced man must go against the odds to save him with the help of an old friend. (2017)

Scorching British sci-fi with Christopher Lee. A freak heatwave hits the island of Fara and leaves the locals incapacitated, leading a visiting scientist to suspect that aliens are to blame. (1967)

Crime drama based on true events, with Peter Falk. When a crook learns a supposedly impenetrable security firm is anything but secure, he rounds up a gang for a multi-million dollar heist. (1978)

Western with Gregory Peck. An ageing bank robber goes in search of his former partner, who double-crossed him - but finds himself forced to take care of a little girl. (1971)
Thriller with Samuel L Jackson. A trained black-ops interrogator and an FBI agent resort to extreme measures to coerce a terrorist to disclose the location of three nuclear devices. (2010)
